description: Create a NextGen Connect channel named 'Bed_Card_Generator' that generates printable HTML 'Bed Cards' for patients. The channel must listen for HL7 ADT messages (v2.x, MLLP) on TCP port 6661. For each message, perform a database lookup in the 'doctors' table (columns: doctor_id, full_name) within the PostgreSQL database (Connection: jdbc:postgresql://nextgen-postgres:5432/mirthdb; Credentials: postgres/postgres) using the ID from PV1-7.1. Generate a valid HTML file containing the Patient Name, MRN, DOB, and the Attending Doctor's Full Name; if the lookup fails, default the doctor name to 'On Call'. Save the output to '/home/ga/bed_cards/' using the naming convention '[LastName]_[MRN].html'. A sample message is available at /home/ga/sample_adt.hl7.
